chat_placeholder: Ask about stocks, upload a PDF/CSV, or speak…
ai_disclaimer: Clarity AI can make mistakes. Always verify financial information independently.
pro_mode_desc: Connected to Institutional Liquidity Pool #482. Latency: 4ms.
wrapped_desc: See your top sectors, risk profile, and AI-powered insights.
portfolio_up: Your portfolio is up 4.2% today. Bitcoin is leading the rally.
empty_state_heading: How can I help you today?
empty_state_subtext: Ask about stocks, build portfolios, get market news, or analyze financial risk.
upload_tooltip: Upload PDF or CSV for analysis
login_subtext: Sign in to your account to continue
signup_subtext: Join Clarity and get AI-powered market intelligence
signup_success: Account created successfully! Please sign in.
pw_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
landing_hero_sub: A dual-mode AI platform for retail simplicity and institutional precision. Built for those who demand clarity in chaos.
velocity_sub: Switch seamlessly between intuitive personal wealth management and high-frequency institutional execution.
retail_mode_sub: Simplified AI-driven insights for everyday growth. Zero-knowledge trading with one-tap rebalancing and risk mitigation.
pro_mode_sub: Institutional precision. Full API access, custom algorithmic execution, and sub-millisecond liquidity routing.
neural_desc: Our LLM-integrated engine scans 4.2 billion data points per second to identify cross-asset discrepancies before they hit the public order book.
quantum_desc: Assets are secured using post-quantum cryptographic standards, ensuring your intelligence remains private and your capital remains yours.
cta_sub: Join 50,000+ traders and institutions leveraging the world's most advanced financial intelligence engine.
footer_copyright: © 2024 CLARITY SYNTHETIC PULSE. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
wrapped_page_sub: See how your portfolio performed, which sectors you favored, and how your investing behavior shaped your results.
stocks_sub: Real-time market data and trending stocks
start_investing_desc: Start your investment journey to build wealth for tomorrow.
mutual_funds_sub: Discover, compare and invest in top mutual funds
cached_backend: Cached Data · Start Backend for Live
no_news_filters: No news found matching your filters.
features_sub: A full-stack financial intelligence suite — from AI chat to encrypted exports, live markets to camera scanning.
feat_ai_desc: Groq-powered LLM analyses your portfolio in real-time, answers complex queries, and generates personalised insights instantly.
feat_analytics_desc: Deep P&L breakdowns, risk coefficients, beta calculation, and asset allocation — all rendered live from your actual holdings.
feat_market_desc: Real-time stock & crypto data via Finnhub with sentiment indicators, alpha detection, and volatility signals.
feat_news_desc: Curated financial news ranked by relevance to your holdings, with AI-generated market impact summaries.
feat_pdf_desc: AES-256 encrypted portfolio reports saved as .secure files — only readable inside Clarity. Checksum verified, expiry supported.
feat_camera_desc: Point your camera at any product — TensorFlow COCO-SSD detects it and instantly redirects you to BuyHatke for price comparison.
feat_bank_desc: Connect and manage multiple bank accounts and treasury vaults within a single unified financial workspace.
feat_biometric_desc: Enterprise-grade access control with biometric toggle, 2FA, and session-scoped decryption — your data never leaves your device.
feat_wrapped_desc: A Spotify-Wrapped-style year-in-review of your financial journey — highlight reel, top holdings, and growth story.
testimonial_1_body: Finally a platform that merges institutional-grade analysis with a retail-friendly interface. The AI insights alone are worth it.
testimonial_2_body: Encrypted PDF exports and biometric access give me the security confidence I need for client portfolios.
testimonial_3_body: The camera scanner feature is genuinely unprecedented in a fintech app. BuyHatke integration is clever.
